home.heroSubtext: HMG Concepts is a Nigerian educational and technology brand built on one conviction: that every learner deserves access to quality, deliberate, and forward-looking education.
home.missionBody: HMG Concepts was born in 2015 from a frustration and a conviction. The frustration: that Nigerian students deserved better than what the system was offering. The conviction: that technology, deliberately applied, could close that gap.

about.originBody:
HMG Concepts — full name, His Marvellous Grace Educational Consult — was founded in 2015 by Adewale Samson Adeagbo, a secondary school teacher with a burning question: why were Nigerian students being failed by a system that could be fixed?

The answer wasn't to complain. It was to build. So that's what he did.
about.founderQuote: I always wanted to solve classroom problems with technology. That drive is what led me to study Computer Science Education — and it's what still drives every decision we make at HMG Concepts today.
about.storyBody: What began as a one-man tutoring operation has grown into a full brand with three subsidiaries: HMG Academy (virtual schooling), HMG Technologies (EdTech & data solutions), and HMG Media (content & digital presence). Through it all, the philosophy has never changed: Learning Deliberately. Teaching Authentically.

values.title: Deliberate Learning
values.body: We don't teach for passing exams alone. We teach for understanding — building students who can think, not just recall.

values.title: Authentic Teaching
values.body: Our teachers bring real experience, not just qualifications. Every lesson is grounded in what actually works in the classroom.

values.title: Technology as a Tool
values.body: We leverage technology deliberately — to expand access, improve outcomes, and solve problems that have long gone unsolved.

values.title: Access for All
values.body: Quality education should not be a privilege. HMG Academy is virtual precisely so that geography and circumstance are never barriers.

values.title: Community Impact
values.body: We build for Nigeria. Every tool, every lesson, every piece of content is made with the Nigerian learner in mind.

values.title: Continuous Growth
values.body: We practise what we preach. HMG Concepts is a learning organisation — always upskilling, always improving, always evolving.

academy.intro: HMG Academy is not a tutoring service. It is a full educational institution — with a team of experienced teachers, structured curriculum, and comprehensive academic support — delivered entirely online.

levels.title: Primary School
levels.body: Strong foundational education in core subjects — building numeracy, literacy, and critical thinking from the earliest stage.

levels.title: Junior Secondary (JSS 1–3)
levels.body: Comprehensive coverage of all JSS subjects, with consistent assessment to track and improve student progress.

levels.title: Senior Secondary (SSS 1–3)
levels.body: Science, Arts, and Commercial streams — taught by specialists who understand both the subject and the exam.

levels.title: WAEC / NECO / GCE Prep
levels.body: Targeted revision, past question drills, and mock exams — giving students the best possible chance at distinction.

levels.title: JAMB / UTME Prep
levels.body: Subject-specific and CBT-format preparation — because knowing the content is only half the battle.

levels.title: Admission Processing
levels.body: End-to-end support for Post-UTME, Direct Entry, and university admission — from application to acceptance.

features.title: Seasoned Teachers
features.body: Our educators are experienced classroom professionals — not just subject-matter hobbyists.

features.title: 100% Virtual
features.body: Learn from anywhere in Nigeria. All you need is a device and an internet connection.

features.title: Exam Registration Support
features.body: We handle WAEC, NECO, GCE, and UTME registration — so students and parents don't navigate it alone.

features.title: CBT Preparation
features.body: Our CBT lab and question bank system prepares students for the digital exam environment.

features.title: Student Counselling
features.body: Academic and career counselling is built into our approach. We help students figure out their path.

features.title: Quiz & Competition Programmes
features.body: Inter-school quiz competitions, debate, and an upcoming inter-school hackathon.

team.name: Adewale Samson Adeagbo
team.bio: Educator, data scientist, and founder of HMG Concepts. 15+ years of teaching experience across Lagos and Ogun State.
